---
title: "Matilda Anne Mackarness"
---

## Matilda Anne Mackarness

**Dates:** (1826-1881)

**Maiden name:** (Planché)

### Description

writer for children

### Biography

Younger daughter of James Robinson Planché, the dramatist, she married (1852) the Rev. Henry S. Mackarness (d. 1868), brother of John Fielder Mackarness.  She was left a widow with seven children, lived with her father, wrote children's books [DNB]

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
